title: Spec 06 §8.3 signing pseudocode contradicts verification
description: spec/06-security.md:44-48: signing pseudocode says e = H(R||pubkey||msg) with comment 'full 256-bit hash', then s = r + e*privkey — but its own verification block (:55) recovers R' with the zero-extended TRUNCATED e. If signing used the full 256-bit e no signature would ever verify. draft-lichen-schnorr-00 §4.2 (e_scalar = e || zeros(16)) and all implementations use the truncated e. Editorial fix: amend §8.3 to show e_scalar = e[0:16] || zeros(16).
